
  // Type_copy
  public class Type_copy {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
  }
  // Generic_copy_any
  public class Generic_copy_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_copy = e_copy
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_copy_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_copy
    }
  }
  // Generic_copy_type
  public class Generic_copy_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_copy = v_copy_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_copy = v_copy_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_copy = v_copy_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_copy = f_copy(type_type, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_copy_constructor
  public static func v_copy_constructor(
  ) -> Type_copy {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_copy()
  }
  // v_copy_create
  public static func v_copy_create(
  ) -> Type_copy {
    var output : Type_copy = v_copy_constructor()
    v_copy_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_copy_register
  public static func v_copy_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_copy_startup_type()
    v_copy_startup_empty()
    return t_copy
  }
  // v_copy_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_copy_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_copy
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_copy_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
  }
  // v_copy_startup - mutating
  public static func v_copy_startup(
    _ value : Type_copy
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_copy_any = Generic_copy_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_copy,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_copy_startup_empty
  public static func v_copy_startup_empty() {
    v_copy_startup(e_copy)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_copy,
      e_copy.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_copy_startup_type
  public static func v_copy_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_copy
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/copy")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_func
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_copy_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_copy_from_listany
  public static func f_copy_from_listany(
    _ type_type : Type_type,
    _ listany : [Type_any]
  ) -> Type_any {
    var generic_type : Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    var output : Type_any = generic_type.p_copy(type_type, listany)
    return output
  }
  // f_copy
  public static func f_copy(
    _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
    _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Type_any {
    let listany : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = Vx_Core.v_listany_from_anylist(type_anylist)
    return Vx_Core.v_copy_from_listany(
      type_type,
      listany
    )
  }
  public static let t_copy : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.Type_type()
  public static let e_copy : Type_copy = Type_copy()
